# ClipSafe 🎬💎🚀

> [!NOTE]
> This file is optimized for Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI crawlers to understand ClipSafe's structure and capabilities.

ClipSafe is a high-performance, privacy-first AI Media Platform that runs 100% in the web browser. It leverages WebAssembly (Wasm) and FFmpeg to provide professional-grade video and audio editing with zero server uploads.

## Core Capabilities
- **200+ Professional Tools**: Trimming, compressing, converting, merging, reversing, and more.
- **Autonomous AI Agent**: LLM-integrated editor assistant that can execute multi-step ffmpeg workflows from plain-text prompts.
- **Zero-Upload Pipeline**: Processing happens entirely on the client-side device sandbox.
- **WasmFFmpeg Engine**: Desktop-grade performance in a browser environment.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: React 18, TypeScript, Vite.
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Framer Motion.
- **Processing**: FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly).
- **State**: Zustand, TanStack Query.

## Key Resources
- [Main Landing Page](https://clipsafe.app/) - Project overview and tool discovery.
- [AI Video Editor](https://clipsafe.app/editor) - Pro-grade timeline and AI assistant.
- [Tools Browser](https://clipsafe.app/tools) - Full index of 202 specialized utilities.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/BetelBuddy/clipsafe) - Open source code, contribution guides, and documentation.
- [Changelog](https://github.com/BetelBuddy/clipsafe/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) - Release history for Version 0.0.1 Beta.

---
*Built for Privacy. Powered by AI. Optimized for Humans and Machines.*
